untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) sector momentum assessment - no sector-level indicator available in allowed list; (2) 8MA trailing stop loss - sma_8 exists but dynamic trailing stop logic cannot be expressed as a static 3-field condition; (3) morning gap digestibility assessment - gap size/proportion calculation not available; (4) 'multiple entry points early in day' - intraday time-of-day filtering not supported
translation_notes: Partially translated entry using intraday price strength (close > open) and ADX for momentum confirmation. Exit approximated using close crossing below 8-period SMA as proxy for trailing stop. However, the core signal logic around sector momentum, dynamic trailing stops, and gap analysis cannot be fully captured with available indicators and operators. This signal is fundamentally designed for live intraday trading with regime awareness rather than mechanical backtesting.
